item.title: Bio-Symbolic Embeddings for Cognitive Tasks
item.description:
Milestones:

  • Prototype embedding fusion of spiking traces + semantic graphs.
  • Evaluate on toy cognitive benchmarks (memory, planning).
  • Compare against baseline LLM embeddings for transfer and robustness.

item.title: Multi-Agent Lab for Scientific Reasoning
item.description:
Milestones:

  • Tooling adapters for papers/arXiv, code execution, and plotting.
  • Debate/critique loop templates for hypothesis refinement.
  • Case study: drafting a neuroscience experiment protocol end-to-end.

item.title: Cortical Microcircuit Simulation Bench
item.description:
Milestones:

  • Integrating biophysical neuron models with controllable noise profiles.
  • Benchmarking stability vs. perturbation type (Gaussian, Poisson, bursty).
  • Visualizing circuit responses for teaching and experiment planning.
